title: Relayscribe brand config
description: Presentation-only white-label config. Cannot change recorder behavior, the sidecar contract, or the build — only the product name, icon, bundle id, and consent copy.

id.description: Brand slug (kebab-case). Used for build.env output dir and DMG naming.

productName.description: Full product name — window titles, menus, About box, DMG, Info.plist CFBundleDisplayName.

shortName.description: Short brand name used in status copy, e.g. "Sent to <shortName>".

appId.description: Reverse-DNS bundle identifier, unique per brand (Info.plist CFBundleIdentifier + Brand.swift).

supportUrl.description: Support URL surfaced in the app.

icon.description: Path to the brand icon SVG, resolved relative to this brand file. Rasterized to icon.icns at build time.

consent.description: macOS permission prompt copy → Info.plist NS*UsageDescription.
